title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 135.420 - Director of department of economic development, duties, certificate of tax credit — procedure to request
text:
135.420.  Director of department of economic development, duties, certificate of tax credit — procedure to request. — The director shall be responsible for the administration and issuance of the certificates of tax credits authorized by sections 135.400 to 135.429.  The director shall issue a certificate of tax credit at the request of any qualified investor.  Each request shall include a true copy of the documents as defined by the administrative rules of the department.  Each request shall be acknowledged under oath by the investor making the request for tax credits.
(L. 1992 S.B. 661 & 620 § 11) 
Effective 1-01-93
